title: NASA Names Jennifer Lyons as Acting Launch Services Program Manager
summary: NASA has selected Jennifer Lyons as acting program manager for the agency’s Launch Services Program (LSP) based at Kennedy Space Center in Florida. In this role, Lyons will lead NASA’s acquisition and management of domestic commercial launch services for science and robotic exploration missions beginning Wednesday, April 1. title: Office of Space Commerce releases mission authorization proposal
summary:
